displayTitle: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 21: Fortress Vader Part III
synopsis: Darth Vader returns to the place of his birth as he seeks the path to his destiny. Echoes from the past reach out to him, both from his own, and from the dark history of the Sith.
title: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith 21: Fortress Vader Part III
